name: Khanty-Mansi Autonomous Okrug (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the upper field, representing the sky
the lower field, representing the taiga and natural wealth of the okrug
the vertical fly stripe and the stylized crown

description: Horizontal bicolour of blue over green with a vertical white stripe along the fly; a stylized white crown (the Yugra Element) is set in the upper hoist on the blue field.
history: Adopted on 20 September 1995, with the crown design modified on 6 December 1995.

features.symbolism: blue above green, the basic field of the okrug flag
the narrow white stripe along the fly edge
a stylized crown drawn from local indigenous ornament, known as the Yugra Element.
